questions.q: Which country recently launched the world's first AI-powered national weather forecasting system?
questions.exp: China launched the world's first AI-powered national weather forecasting system, replacing traditional numerical models with deep learning.

questions.q: The 'Sagarmatha Sambaad' summit is associated with which country?
questions.exp: The Sagarmatha Sambaad (Everest Dialogue) is Nepal's flagship international dialogue forum focused on climate change and mountain ecosystems.

questions.q: Which bank became the first in India to launch a fully paperless gold loan process?
questions.exp: HDFC Bank became the first Indian bank to launch a fully paperless end-to-end gold loan process using digital documentation.
